title: List D: List of Certain Non-prescription Drugs for Distribution as Samples - Canada.ca
content:
## List D: List of Certain Non-prescription Drugs for Distribution as Samples
This is an ambulatory list of the specific non-prescription drugs that can be distributed as samples directly to consumers as per the Regulations Amending the Food and Drug Regulations (Distribution of Drugs as Samples) Subsection C.01.001(1) of the Food and Drug Regulations.
Supersedes: 2020-04-29
Date issued: 2022-11-16
Only non-prescription drugs listed below can be distributed as samples to adult consumers (18 years or older).
Class of Non-prescription Drugs
Medicinal Ingredient (s)
Quantity of Active Ingredient (s)
Route(s) of Administration
Permissible Use(s) or Purpose(s)
Last Revised (YYYY-MM-DD)
All approved ingredients
All approved quantities
All approved uses or purposes
All approved ingredients

All approved uses or purposes

All approved ingredients
All approved quantities

All approved uses or purposes

All approved ingredients

All approved uses or purposes

All approved ingredients
All approved quantities
All approved uses or purposes
Medicated Skin Care Products
All approved ingredients
All approved quantities
All approved uses or purposes except antifungals, antivirals, antibiotics, corticosteroids, counterirritants, and analgesics
Acne Therapy Products
All approved ingredients

All approved uses or purposes
